days.title: Arrival in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Welcome to the bustling capital of Japan

timeline.title: Arrive at Narita Airport
timeline.detail: Disembark and go through customs. Grab a Suica card for convenient transport around Tokyo. Follow signs to the Narita Express for a direct trip to the city.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
timeline.detail: You've arrived at your hotel located in the heart of Shinjuku. It's a 5-minute walk from Shinjuku station. Settle in and refresh from your journey.

timeline.title: Visit Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
timeline.detail: Explore this serene garden, a beautiful blend of traditional Japanese, English, and French styles. Perfect for a leisure walk before dinner.
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Dinner at Omoide Yokocho
timeline.detail: Dine at this vibrant alley filled with tiny izakayas serving yakitori and other local delicacies. Experience the atmosphere that encapsulates Tokyo's culinary heritage.

timeline.title: Explore Shinjuku Nightlife
timeline.detail: Wander through the lively streets of Shinjuku. Check out the neon lights, entertainment spots, and perhaps visit a karaoke bar for a fun night.

localTips: Purchase a Suica card at Narita Airport for easy access to public transport.
Download the Tokyo Metro app for real-time navigation.
Try some street food at Omoide Yokocho; it's a local favorite.

days.title: Cultural Day in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Visiting historic sites and traditional markets

timeline.title: Breakfast at Tsukiji Outer Market
timeline.detail: Start your day with fresh sushi and seafood at this lively market. Explore various stalls offering street food and local delicacies.

timeline.title: Visit Senso-ji Temple
timeline.detail: Explore Tokyo's oldest temple, where you can admire the stunning architecture and the vibrant shopping street of Nakamise. Appreciate the spiritual atmosphere.

timeline.title: Lunch at Asakusa
timeline.detail: Enjoy an authentic tempura meal at a local restaurant. Don't miss tasting the traditional dishes that Japan is famous for.

timeline.title: Sumida River Cruise
timeline.detail: Take a scenic boat ride along the Sumida River, offering picturesque views of Tokyo. The cruise will take you towards Odaiba while showcasing the city's skyline.

timeline.title: Explore Akihabara
timeline.detail: Dive into the world of manga, anime, and electronics. Visit shops that sell rare items and experience the unique culture of this district.

timeline.title: Dinner at Tsukishima Monjayaki Street
timeline.detail: Try monjayaki, a Tokyo-style savory pancake, at one of the local izakayas. Join the locals as you cook it right at your table.

localTips: Get to Tsukiji Early to avoid long queues.
Always be respectful at temples; observe silence when entering.
Download a translation app for easier communication in restaurants.

days.title: Last Day in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Exploring Harajuku and Departure

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a hearty breakfast at your hotel before embarking on your final day in Tokyo. Fuel up for a day of exploration.

timeline.title: Visit Meiji Shrine
timeline.detail: Start your day at this peaceful Shinto shrine surrounded by a beautiful forest. It's just a short walk from Harajuku. Enjoy the tranquil atmosphere.

timeline.title: Explore Harajuku's Takeshita Street
timeline.detail: Shop for trendy fashion and unique items along Takeshita Street. Don't forget to try a crepe from one of the famous crepe shops.

timeline.title: Lunch at Harajuku
timeline.detail: Grab a bite at one of the quaint cafes in Harajuku. Enjoy the lively atmosphere and the colorful surroundings.

timeline.title: Last-Minute Shopping at Shibuya
timeline.detail: Head to Shibuya for some last-minute shopping. Experience the famous Shibuya Crossing and take some fun photos before you leave.

timeline.title: Departure from Narita Airport
timeline.detail: Time to head back to Narita Airport. Take the Narita Express from Shibuya station. Enjoy your flight back home!

localTips: Try to visit Meiji Shrine early to avoid crowds.
Use the Google Maps app for public transport routes.
Keep some yen handy for small purchases in Harajuku.

hotels.name: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
hotels.note: 5-min walk from Shinjuku station with themed rooms.
